title: A Toad Can Die Of Light!
content:
A toad can die of light!
    Death is the common right
    Of toads and men, --
    Of earl and midge
    The privilege.
    Why swagger then?
    The gnat's supremacy
    Is large as thine.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Emily Elizabeth Dickinson delivers a powerful performance in "A Toad Can Die Of Light!"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
